nasb.text: When the Pharisee saw it, he was surprised that He had not first ceremonially washed before the meal.

esv.text: The Pharisee was astonished to see that he did not first wash before dinner.

cnv.text: 這個法利賽人見耶穌吃飯之前不洗手，覺得奇怪。

ccb.text: 这位法利赛人看见耶稣饭前没有行犹太人洗手的礼仪，十分诧异。

csbs.text: 那个法利赛人看见耶稣午餐之前不行洗净礼，感到惊奇。
